hi, samantha here.

I am a Biomedical Engineering graduate — born in Caracas, raised in New York. Curious, passionate, and driven to advance biochemical research, medical device innovation, and quality systems through creativity, science, and technology.

✉  Say hi!

/ about me

Hi there, I am Sam. Sam I am.

I am a recent graduate of Syracuse University with a B.S. in Biomedical Engineering. Those 4 years taught me everything from the worlds of electrical, mechanical, chemical, biological, and computational engineering. Whilst teaching me a little of everything, I grew extremely interested in the potential that computational biology could have on the future.

I am driven by a passion to not only contribute to medicine but to advance it. I am curious about how combining healthcare with technology could personalize medicine and also reach a larger audience seamlessly. It would be amazing to explore opportunities in medical device innovation, biochemical research, global regulatory affairs, and quality systems.

Here are some areas and tools I've been working with:

Python / MATLAB
Global Reg. Affairs
Machine Learning
Medical Devices
Protein Purification
R-Studio
Cell Culture
Fusion360 / Arduino

/ experience

CORNELL
UPSTATE MED
iGEM
HUBBARD BROOK
PEDIATRICS

Research Intern @ Weill Cornell Medicine — Dept. of Epidemiology

JUN 2026 — AUG 2026 · NEW YORK, NY
  • Preprocessing high-dimensional multi-omics TCGA-OV data and engineering women-specific clinical features (BRCA1/2, HRD, platinum response) to fine-tune the SeNMo deep learning model for ovarian cancer survival prediction.
  • Implementing and evaluating statistical and machine learning models in Python and PyTorch with stratified cross-validation, benchmarking against the published 0.518 C-index baseline.
  • Generating Kaplan-Meier curves and HGSOC subgroup analyses to interpret model performance and prepare research outputs for publication.

Research Assistant @ Upstate Medical University SUNY

SEPT 2024 — OCT 2025 · SYRACUSE, NY
  • Developed a high-throughput screening system for prokaryotic-based peptide and protein libraries investigating binding interactions with SUMO and ULP proteins.
  • Applied advanced protein purification and molecular biology techniques to optimize experimental protocols and validate results, contributing to scalable therapeutic candidate identification.
  • Combined bench and in silico approaches by coupling wet lab biochemistry with supervised machine learning algorithms for protein purification process optimization.
  • Collaborated with the Biochemistry & Molecular Biology department to leverage computational modeling and bioinformatics resources.

President & CEO @ iGEM Syracuse University

JAN 2023 — DEC 2025 · SYRACUSE, NY
  • Founded the university's first iGEM team, establishing the organizational structure and recruiting a diverse, interdisciplinary team of students.
  • Led proposal development and submission process for international competition, promoting collaboration across departments.
  • Trained and mentored new team members on scientific workflows, compliance expectations, and organizational processes.
  • Managed project timelines, deliverables, and stakeholder communications across a multidisciplinary team.

Research Assistant @ HB Experimental Forest

APR 2024 — AUG 2024 · WOODSTOCK, NH
  • Disseminated research on particulate organic carbon and nanoparticles in subsurface chemical interactions, analyzing seasonal, elevational, and horizontal variations.
  • Highlighted wollastonite's (CaSiO₃) role in mitigating acid rain impacts across watershed ecosystems.
  • Volunteered with TACNY STEM Trekkers Summer Camp on the effects of seasonal changes on lake stratification.

Administrative Assistant @ Pediatrics Clinic

AUG 2018 — JUNE 2021 · QUEENS, NY
  • Collaborated with clinical staff to optimize patient care protocols through meticulous room preparation and maintaining sterile environments.
  • Leveraged bilingual (English/Spanish) skills to bridge communication gaps between medical professionals and Spanish-speaking families.
  • Managed insurance documentation, billing coordination, and patient records with strict HIPAA compliance.
